Added_Graphics.name: FFlagTexturePacksFallbackReferenceManaged_Staged
Added_Graphics.mechanism: Implements a fallback system for texture packs when the main ones fail.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Ensures players can still see textures even if the preferred ones don't load.

Added_Graphics.name: FFlagTexturePriorityBasedOnDistance_Staged
Added_Graphics.mechanism: Prioritizes loading textures based on how close they are to the player.
Added_Graphics.purpose: Ensures better visual fidelity and smoother gameplay by loading important textures first.
